Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

Class InventoryPanelFX.InventoryRow

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.InventoryPanelFX.InventoryRow
Enclosing class:
InventoryPanelFX
public static class InventoryPanelFX.InventoryRow extends Object
A data class (POJO) representing a row in the inventory TableView. It wraps an InventoryItem and provides properties suitable for JavaFX table binding. Note: Fields are package-private for direct access from InventoryPanelFX methods, which is a simpler approach for this UI context but less encapsulated.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) BigDecimal
    accDep
    The accumulated depreciation for the item.
    (package private) String
    acquired
    The date the item was acquired, as a string (e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD").
    (package private) BigDecimal
    cost
    The original cost of the inventory item.
    (package private) String
    id
    The unique ID of the inventory item.
    (package private) int
    lifeYears
    The expected useful life of the item in years, for depreciation purposes.
    (package private) String
    name
    The name or description of the inventory item.
    (package private) BigDecimal
    netValue
    The net book value of the item (cost - accumulated depreciation).

  • Field Details

    • id

      String id
      The unique ID of the inventory item.

    • name

      String name
      The name or description of the inventory item.

    • acquired

      String acquired
      The date the item was acquired, as a string (e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD").

    • cost

      BigDecimal cost
      The original cost of the inventory item.

    • accDep

      BigDecimal accDep
      The accumulated depreciation for the item.

    • netValue

      BigDecimal netValue
      The net book value of the item (cost - accumulated depreciation).

    • lifeYears

      int lifeYears
      The expected useful life of the item in years, for depreciation purposes.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryRow

      InventoryRow(InventoryItem i)
      Constructs an InventoryRow from an InventoryItem object. Initializes all fields by extracting data from the given item.
      Parameters:
      i - The InventoryItem from which to create the row data. Must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the ID of the inventory item.
      Returns:
      The ID string.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the inventory item.
      Returns:
      The item's name.

    • getAcquired

      public String getAcquired()
      Gets the acquired date of the inventory item.
      Returns:
      The acquired date as a string.

    • getCost

      public BigDecimal getCost()
      Gets the cost of the inventory item.
      Returns:
      The cost as a BigDecimal.

    • getAccDep

      public BigDecimal getAccDep()
      Gets the accumulated depreciation of the inventory item.
      Returns:
      The accumulated depreciation as a BigDecimal.

    • getNetValue

      public BigDecimal getNetValue()
      Gets the net book value of the inventory item.
      Returns:
      The net book value as a BigDecimal.

    • toItem

      InventoryItem toItem()
      Converts this InventoryRow back into an InventoryItem object. This is useful for passing data back to the service layer after editing in the UI. The accumulated depreciation from the row is preserved in the new item.
      Returns:
      A new InventoryItem instance populated with data from this row.
